name: Tanzin v. Tanvir
summary: The Supreme Court held 8-0 that RFRA permits suits for money damages against federal officials in their individual capacities, based on the text authorizing 'appropriate relief against a government' defined to include officials.
significance: Held unanimously that RFRA's identical 'appropriate relief against a government' language authorizes individual capacity damages suits against federal officials. Petitioner argues RLUIPA must be read the same way as its 'sister statute.'
